crash.message:
AssertionError: SQL query built with an f-string — vulnerable to injection.
  Found: f"SELECT {safe_columns} FROM users"
  Pass filter values as a separate argument tuple using ? or %s placeholders.
assert <re.Match object; span=(1667, 1702), match='f"SELECT {safe_columns} FROM users"'> is None

call.longrepr:
E   AssertionError: SQL query built with an f-string — vulnerable to injection.
      Found: f"SELECT {safe_columns} FROM users"
      Pass filter values as a separate argument tuple using ? or %s placeholders.
    assert <re.Match object; span=(1667, 1702), match='f"SELECT {safe_columns} FROM users"'> is None

crash.message:
AssertionError: Arbitrary column name was accepted as a filter key.
  Validate all filter keys against an allowlist before query construction.
assert ([{'email': 'a...': 'charlie'}] == []
  
  Left contains 3 more items, first extra item: {'email': 'alice@example.com', 'role': 'admin', 'status': 'active', 'username': 'alice'}
  Use -v to get more diff or [{'email': 'alice@example.com', 'role': 'admin', 'status': 'active', 'username': 'alice'}, {'email': 'bob@example.com'...', 'username': 'bob'}, {'email': 'charlie@example.com', 'role': 'admin', 'status': 'suspended', 'username': 'charlie'}] is None)

call.longrepr:
E   AssertionError: Arbitrary column name was accepted as a filter key.
      Validate all filter keys against an allowlist before query construction.
    assert ([{'email': 'a...': 'charlie'}] == []
      
      Left contains 3 more items, first extra item: {'email': 'alice@example.com', 'role': 'admin', 'status': 'active', 'username': 'alice'}
      Use -v to get more diff or [{'email': 'alice@example.com', 'role': 'admin', 'status': 'active', 'username': 'alice'}, {'email': 'bob@example.com'...', 'username': 'bob'}, {'email': 'charlie@example.com', 'role': 'admin', 'status': 'suspended', 'username': 'charlie'}] is None)

vuln_issues.text: Possible SQL injection vector through string-based query construction.

vuln_issues.message: search_users does not validate filter keys against an allowlist — vulnerable to column injection.

cwe: CWE-89: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command

vuln_issues.message: search_users may return sensitive fields such as password or token to the caller.

cwe: CWE-200: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor
